summary: Iteration 21 - NENO Exchange Bug Fix Verification Complete. The 'body stream already read' bug fix (res.clone() pattern in safeJson) is working correctly. All 5 Exchange operations (Buy, Sell, Swap, Off-Ramp, Create Token) completed successfully with green success banners. Backend APIs 100% pass. Frontend UI 100% pass. The 'body stream' errors in console are from WalletConnect external library, NOT from the NENO Exchange code.

issues: WalletConnect preloadListings 'body stream already read' error - external library issue, NOT related to NENO Exchange fix

critical_code_review_comments: safeJson with res.clone() pattern working correctly - no body stream errors in NENO Exchange operations
safeGet and safePost helpers properly handle all fetch operations
All 5 Exchange tabs (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Off-Ramp, Crea Token) fully functional
Quote endpoints return correct calculations with 0.3% platform fee
Transaction history updates correctly after each operation
NENO Balance in header updates after operations
Settings page has all 9 languages (IT, EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, JA, ZH, AR)

success_rate.backend: 100% (All 5 operations: Buy, Sell, Swap, Off-Ramp, Create Token)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, green success banners for all operations)

seed_data_creation: Custom tokens TESTX4621 and UI4746 created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified in iteration 21. The 'body stream already read' error was fixed by implementing res.clone() pattern in safeJson function. All NENO Exchange operations work correctly. The 'body stream' errors in console are from WalletConnect external library (preloadListings), not from the app code. Admin has ~10000 NENO balance, ~44969 EUR, ~0.59 ETH.

walletconnect_note: The 'body stream already read' errors in console are from WalletConnect external library (preloadListings function), NOT from the NENO Exchange code. This is a known issue with WalletConnect and does not affect app functionality.
